title: schefflera gleasonii
intro: Schefflera gleasonii, also known as the Golden Cane Palm or Golden Cane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its flavonoid and saponin content. The health benefits of Schefflera gleasonii include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially having anti-cancer properties. Schefflera gleasonii is often prepared for herbal use as a tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and optimal preparation methods.
